3d_printing.mechanism: forms shapes without first making special molds
3d_printing.primitive_phrase: builds an object layer by layer from a digital plan

airbag.mechanism: spreads the stopping force over a larger area and time
airbag.primitive_phrase: inflates a cushion very quickly during a collision

algorithmic_feed.mechanism: places more likely relevant items before less relevant ones
algorithmic_feed.primitive_phrase: orders messages by calculated signals of likely interest

anti_lock_braking_system.mechanism: helps tires keep grip for steering
anti_lock_braking_system.primitive_phrase: rapidly reduces and restores brake force when wheels begin to lock

antibiotic_resistance.mechanism: lets surviving germs become more common after treatment
antibiotic_resistance.primitive_phrase: describes germs surviving a medicine and passing that trait onward

antiviral_drug.primitive_phrase: interferes with a step the virus needs to copy itself

api.mechanism: gives both systems a stable contract for requests and replies
api.primitive_phrase: offers a published set of commands that one machine can use to request work from another

autopilot.mechanism: makes repeated small corrections without constant human input
autopilot.primitive_phrase: uses instruments and control rules to adjust steering automatically

battery_storage.mechanism: shifts energy from the time it is made to the time it is needed
battery_storage.primitive_phrase: stores electrical energy chemically for later release

biofuel.mechanism: uses carbon from recent growth rather than ancient deposits
biofuel.primitive_phrase: makes burnable fuel from recently grown biological material

biometric_authentication.mechanism: uses a hard-to-share personal physical trait
biometric_authentication.primitive_phrase: compares a body feature with a stored reference

blockchain.mechanism: makes later alteration easy to detect
blockchain.primitive_phrase: links records so each new record depends on earlier records

cache.mechanism: avoids recomputing or refetching the same result

carbon_capture.mechanism: prevents part of the unwanted gas from escaping
carbon_capture.primitive_phrase: separates carbon-bearing gas before it enters the air

carbon_fiber_composite.primitive_phrase: embeds strong fibers inside a binding material

climate_model.mechanism: tests how changes may influence a large connected system
climate_model.primitive_phrase: uses mathematical rules to simulate air, water, and energy flows

cloud_computing.mechanism: adds or removes remote capacity without owning every machine locally
cloud_computing.primitive_phrase: rents distant computing machines as needed

cloud_file_sharing.mechanism: gives each worker access to a shared current copy

contact_tracing_app.mechanism: helps identify contacts faster than memory alone
contact_tracing_app.primitive_phrase: keeps recent encounter records on a portable communication device

contactless_payment.mechanism: reduces handling and manual writing of payment details
contactless_payment.primitive_phrase: sends payment information over a very short wireless distance

continuous_glucose_monitor.mechanism: shows trends that isolated measurements miss
continuous_glucose_monitor.primitive_phrase: uses a small sensor to measure body chemistry repeatedly

crispr.mechanism: aims the change at a chosen location instead of altering many places
crispr.primitive_phrase: uses a guided molecular tool to cut a selected hereditary location

cruise_control.primitive_phrase: automatically adjusts engine force to hold a chosen speed

ct_scan.mechanism: reconstructs slices that show internal structure
ct_scan.primitive_phrase: combines many narrow X-ray views into cross-section pictures

data_compression.mechanism: represents the same information with fewer symbols
data_compression.primitive_phrase: uses shorter codes for repeated or predictable parts

database_index.mechanism: avoids inspecting every record one by one
database_index.primitive_phrase: keeps a smaller ordered guide to where records are stored

delivery_drone.mechanism: moves above ground obstacles without a driver onboard
delivery_drone.primitive_phrase: uses a small pilotless flying machine

desalination_membrane.mechanism: separates salt from water without boiling all of it
desalination_membrane.primitive_phrase: lets water pass while holding back much dissolved salt

digital_camera.mechanism: stores pictures as data that can be copied immediately
digital_camera.primitive_phrase: records light as numerical picture elements

digital_map.mechanism: updates directions from stored roads and current position
digital_map.primitive_phrase: stores map data and computes paths on a machine

dna_sequencing.mechanism: reveals the exact order where differences can be found
dna_sequencing.primitive_phrase: reads the order of hereditary chemical units

e_book.mechanism: reduces physical bulk while preserving the written content
e_book.primitive_phrase: stores book text as electronic data

e_commerce.mechanism: removes the need to visit the shop physically
e_commerce.primitive_phrase: uses electronic catalogues, orders, and payment records

edge_computing.mechanism: cuts delay by avoiding a long trip to a remote machine
edge_computing.primitive_phrase: does computation near the measuring device instead of a distant center

electric_vehicle.mechanism: avoids burning fuel at the vehicle while moving
electric_vehicle.primitive_phrase: moves by an electric motor powered from stored electrical energy

electronic_medical_record.mechanism: makes the same record easier to retrieve and transmit
electronic_medical_record.primitive_phrase: keeps patient records as machine-readable data

elisa.mechanism: turns specific binding into a visible measurement
elisa.primitive_phrase: uses a binding reaction plus a color signal

email.mechanism: delivers text without a physical carrier
email.primitive_phrase: moves written messages between machine mailboxes

encryption.mechanism: keeps intercepted text unintelligible to outsiders

food_delivery_app.mechanism: coordinates the parties without repeated telephone calls
food_delivery_app.primitive_phrase: matches customer, restaurant, courier, and payment through portable messages

fusion_reactor.mechanism: releases energy from combining light atoms
fusion_reactor.primitive_phrase: joins light atomic nuclei under extreme conditions

genome_wide_association_study.mechanism: finds statistical associations between variations and outcomes
genome_wide_association_study.primitive_phrase: compares many hereditary positions across many people

gps.mechanism: derives location from measured signal timing

gpu_acceleration.primitive_phrase: uses many small calculating units at the same time

high_speed_rail.mechanism: carries many people quickly with guided motion
high_speed_rail.primitive_phrase: uses trains and track designed for sustained very high speed

hybrid_car.mechanism: recovers or reuses energy that would otherwise be wasted
hybrid_car.primitive_phrase: combines a fuel engine with an electric drive and stored energy

instant_messaging.mechanism: reduces delay compared with ordinary letters

insulin_pump.mechanism: adjusts dosing more continuously than occasional injections
insulin_pump.primitive_phrase: releases measured small doses of medicine through a wearable device

internet.mechanism: lets messages travel across many linked networks
internet.primitive_phrase: connects many smaller machine networks into one addressing system

lab_on_a_chip.mechanism: uses little sample and short paths to speed measurement
lab_on_a_chip.primitive_phrase: moves tiny drops through small channels on a plate

led_lighting.mechanism: turns more electrical energy into light and less into waste heat

lithium_ion_battery.mechanism: gives high energy for its weight

machine_learning.mechanism: learns recurring patterns from past examples
machine_learning.primitive_phrase: adjusts its rules after seeing many labelled cases

medical_ultrasound.mechanism: forms pictures from returning sound waves
medical_ultrasound.primitive_phrase: sends high-frequency sound and measures echoes

microplastics.mechanism: focuses attention on particles too small to see easily

monoclonal_antibody.mechanism: binds mainly to the chosen marker instead of many unrelated ones
monoclonal_antibody.primitive_phrase: uses many copies of a single highly specific defensive molecule

mri.mechanism: distinguishes soft tissues without using a knife

mrna_vaccine.mechanism: trains defenses without giving the whole disease agent

natural_language_processing.mechanism: groups texts by language evidence rather than manual reading alone
natural_language_processing.primitive_phrase: uses statistical patterns in words and phrases

neural_network.mechanism: combines many small weighted signals into a prediction
neural_network.primitive_phrase: connects many simple adjustable units in layers

ocean_cleanup_device.mechanism: gathers scattered waste so it can be removed
ocean_cleanup_device.primitive_phrase: uses barriers and currents to concentrate floating material

ocr.mechanism: converts images of letters into machine-readable characters

online_banking.mechanism: lets the customer inspect records remotely

online_forum.mechanism: lets many distant people answer the same topic over time

organ_transplant_matching.mechanism: reduces the chance that the body rejects the donated organ
organ_transplant_matching.primitive_phrase: compares biological markers between donor and patient

password_manager.mechanism: lets each service have a strong different secret without memorizing all of them
password_manager.primitive_phrase: stores secret words in a protected vault

pcr.mechanism: turns a small trace into enough material to measure

podcast.mechanism: sends new recordings automatically to interested listeners

pulse_oximeter.mechanism: uses light absorption differences to estimate oxygen level

qr_code.mechanism: lets a machine read the address without manual typing

rag_for_llm_hallucination.mechanism: checks outside records before answering, so unsupported claims are less likely
rag_for_llm_hallucination.primitive_phrase: first searches a store of relevant records before composing a reply

recommendation_algorithm.mechanism: ranks options using evidence of likely preference
recommendation_algorithm.primitive_phrase: calculates suggestions from prior choices and similarities

recommender_system.mechanism: uses preference patterns to rank likely useful items
recommender_system.primitive_phrase: compares past choices and similarities among people or objects

remote_work_software.mechanism: keeps communication and work records accessible from separate places
remote_work_software.primitive_phrase: combines distant speech, documents, and task records

renewable_energy_grid.mechanism: matches supply and demand despite variable sources
renewable_energy_grid.primitive_phrase: coordinates many power sources whose output changes with weather

ride_sharing_app.mechanism: reduces search time by coordinating location and demand
ride_sharing_app.primitive_phrase: uses a portable communication device to match riders and drivers

satellite_monitoring.mechanism: covers wide areas with repeated comparable views
satellite_monitoring.primitive_phrase: observes the earth repeatedly from high above

satellite_television.mechanism: covers areas that ground wires or towers may not reach
satellite_television.primitive_phrase: relays signals through an object high above the earth

search_engine.mechanism: orders many records by signals of relevance
search_engine.primitive_phrase: matches a query against a large catalog and ranks likely useful records

sensor_fusion.mechanism: reduces error by using independent observations together

smart_meter.mechanism: reveals when demand rises or falls
smart_meter.primitive_phrase: records usage frequently and sends readings automatically

smart_thermostat.mechanism: heats or cools less when comfort is not needed
smart_thermostat.primitive_phrase: learns schedules and adjusts temperature automatically

smartphone.mechanism: lets a person communicate and consult records from many places
smartphone.primitive_phrase: combines pocket wireless speech, written messages, tools, and records

social_media.mechanism: uses social links to pass messages rapidly
social_media.primitive_phrase: lets many people publish short messages to connected groups

software_container.mechanism: keeps the program environment consistent across machines
software_container.primitive_phrase: packs a program with the surrounding files it expects

solar_panel.mechanism: uses local sunlight instead of transported fuel
solar_panel.primitive_phrase: turns sunlight directly into electrical current

spam_filter.mechanism: marks likely unwanted messages before they reach the reader
spam_filter.primitive_phrase: learns signs that separate wanted messages from unwanted ones

stem_cell_therapy.mechanism: may replace or support damaged specialized cells
stem_cell_therapy.primitive_phrase: uses cells that can develop into specialized body cells

streaming_video.mechanism: allows playback while later parts are still arriving

telemedicine.mechanism: allows medical judgment without both people being in one room

traffic_sensor_network.mechanism: adjusts decisions using current traffic conditions

wind_turbine_farm.mechanism: converts moving air into electrical power at scale
